message:
wait till labeler is done doing its thing

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,16 +1,10 @@
 name: CI/CD & PR Preview Pipeline
 
 on:
-  # Run after Labeler finishes
-  workflow_run:
-    workflows: ["Labeler"]
-    types: [completed]
-
-  # Standard triggers
   push:
     branches: [main, develop]
   pull_request:
-    types: [opened, reopened, synchronize, closed]
+    types: [opened, reopened, synchronize, closed, labeled]
   pull_request_target:
     types: [labeled]
   workflow_dispatch:
@@ -19,6 +13,37 @@ env:
   NODE_VERSION: "20"
 
 jobs:
+  # ============================================================
+  # 🕒 Wait for Labeler to finish before starting CI
+  # ============================================================
+  wait-for-labeler:
+    name: Wait for Labeler completion
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    permissions:
+      actions: read
+    steps:
+      - name: Wait for any running Labeler workflow
+        env:
+          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
+        run: |
+          echo "⏳ Checking if 'Labeler' workflow is still running..."
+          for i in {1..30}; do
+            running=$(gh run list \
+              --workflow "Labeler" \
+              --branch "${GITHUB_HEAD_REF:-${GITHUB_REF_NAME}}" \
+              --json status \
+              --jq '.[] | select(.status=="in_progress")' || true)
+            if [ -n "$running" ]; then
+              echo "Labeler is still running, waiting 10s..."
+              sleep 10
+            else
+              echo "✅ Labeler finished."
+              break
+            fi
+          done
+          echo "🕓 Letting GitHub settle for 10 seconds..."
+          sleep 10
+
   # ============================================================
   # 🤖 Auto-apply "ok-to-test" for kubestellar org team members
   # ============================================================
@@ -33,7 +58,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Add ok-to-test for trusted kubestellar team members
         uses: actions/github-script@v7
         with:
-          github-token: ${{ secrets.ORG_TOKEN }}   # used for team membership check
+          github-token: ${{ secrets.ORG_TOKEN }}
           script: |
             const org = 'kubestellar';
             const teams = ['kubestellar-contributors', 'kubestellar-docs'];
@@ -61,7 +86,6 @@ jobs:
 
             for (const team of teams) {
               if (await isTeamMember(org, team, prAuthor)) {
-                // ✅ Use repo’s GitHub token to add the label (trusted event)
                 const gh = new github.constructor({
                   auth: process.env.GITHUB_TOKEN
                 });
@@ -91,7 +115,7 @@ jobs:
       contents: read
       pull-requests: write
       issues: write
-    needs: [auto-ok-to-test]
+    needs: [wait-for-labeler, auto-ok-to-test]
     steps:
       - name: Checkout code
         uses: actions/checkout@v4
@@ -185,9 +209,8 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     needs: [ci]
     if: >
-      (github.event_name == 'pull_request' || github.event_name == 'pull_request_target' || github.event_name == 'workflow_run') &&
-      (github.event.action == 'labeled' || github.event.workflow_run.conclusion == 'success') &&
-      (github.event.label.name == 'ok-to-test' || contains(github.event.pull_request.labels.*.name, 'ok-to-test'))
+      (github.event_name == 'pull_request' || github.event_name == 'pull_request_target') &&
+      (github.event.action == 'labeled' || contains(github.event.pull_request.labels.*.name, 'ok-to-test'))
     permissions:
       contents: read
       pull-requests: write
@@ -243,7 +266,7 @@ jobs:
             iad.ocir.io/id4wyucbsggm/kubestellar-docs-prs:pr-${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
             ```
             🌐 **Live Preview (after rollout):**
-            [https://pr-${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}.previews.kubestellar.io](https://pr-${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}.previews.kubestellar.io)
+            [http://pr-${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}.previews.kubestellar.io](http://pr-${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}.previews.kubestellar.io)
 
   # ============================================================
   # 🧹 Cleanup when PR closes
@@ -306,4 +329,4 @@ jobs:
             iad.ocir.io/id4wyucbsggm/kubestellar-docs-prs:pr-${{ github.event.number }}
             ```
             📴 **Preview URL Removed**
-            https://pr-${{ github.event.number }}.previews.kubestellar.io
+            http://pr-${{ github.event.number }}.previews.kubestellar.io
